_meta.purpose: Rolling log of Monte Carlo prediction snapshots for the diff view. Each entry captures probabilities at a point in time so we can show 'after match X, ARG champion prob moved 14.9% -> 18.2%'.
_meta.schema: snapshots: chronological. Most recent last. Capped at MAX_SNAPSHOTS (50) by scripts/snapshot-run.ts.
_meta.entry: { id: ISO timestamp, trigger: short label, decided_matches: int, num_simulations: int, probabilities: { team_id: { champ, final, sf, qf, r16, r32, out } } }
